explanation: This command is a direct match to the Sigma rule and is used as a baseline for testing detection accuracy.
Substituted the long option '/s' with the equivalent short option '-s', which is valid in Diskshadow and may test detection resilience to syntax variation.
Used path normalization (..\) to represent the same file path. This tests whether the detection is sensitive to path obfuscation techniques.
Inserted quotes around the script path to test detection resilience to safe insertion techniques.
Used an environment variable to represent the script path. This tests whether the detection is sensitive to recoding techniques.
Appended a harmless command after the target command to test detection resilience to command chaining.
Used a pipe to pass output to findstr with no filtering effect. This tests detection resilience to safe reordering and appending techniques.
